title: More Music
description: This resource pack adds more ambient music to the game - unused C418 tracks, Halloween DLC tracks, spin-off tracks from Dungeons & Earth and fan-made music
body:
This resource pack adds more music to the game. Duh. That includes unused C418 tracks, Halloween DLC tracks, spin-off tracks and some fan-made music. It also adds some used C418 tracks to more places.

2D logo by [Amaro_Lunático](https://modrinth.com/user/amaro_lunatico) | 3D logo by [UnRoman](https://www.twitter.com/un_roman_)

# Included tracks
### (Unused) OST
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Kyoto_** (Frozen/Jagged Peaks, Snowy Slopes, Grove)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Equinoxe_** (Swamp, Forest, Desert)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Flake_** (Swamp, Dripstone Caves)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Excuse_** (Deep Dark, The End)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Key_** (Deep Dark, The End)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Mice on Venus_** (Deep Dark)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Door_** (Menu)
- **[C418](https://c418.org/) - _Chris_** (Menu)
### Halloween DLC
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _Ghastly Spirits_** (Deep Dark, Soul Sand Valley)
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _Dead Mice_** (Deep Dark)
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _All Ender's Eve_** (The End)
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _Undead Voxel_** (Crimson Forest)
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _Trapdoor_** (Basalt Deltas)
- **[Gareth Coker](https://www.gareth-coker.net/) - _Norway_** (Underwater)
### _Minecraft: Dungeons_
- **[Peter Hont](https://open.spotify.com/artist/0DwspBK0fcKjKh8lkM4FSl) - _Guldrum_** (Deep Dark, The End, Soul Sand Valley, Basalt Deltas, Warped Forest, Nether Wastes)
- **[Peter Hont](https://open.spotify.com/artist/0DwspBK0fcKjKh8lkM4FSl) - _Top_** (The End)
- **[Peter Hont](https://open.spotify.com/artist/0DwspBK0fcKjKh8lkM4FSl) - _Spoopy_** (Menu)
- **[Peter Hont](https://open.spotify.com/artist/0DwspBK0fcKjKh8lkM4FSl) - _Chills_** (Menu)
- **[Johan Johnson](https://open.spotify.com/artist/5M04wavkDSzPpqAzFMAjD2) - _Graveyard_** (Deep Dark, Warped Forest)
- **[Johan Johnson](https://open.spotify.com/artist/5M04wavkDSzPpqAzFMAjD2) - _Brunn_** (Nether Wastes)
- **[Eugnosis](https://eugnosis.bandcamp.com/) - _Camp Cartography_** (Deep Dark)
- **[Eugene Nesci](https://bandcamp.com/eugene) - _Humus-Sifting_** (Warped Forest)
### _Minecraft: Earth_
- **[Shauny Jang](https://www.shaunyjangaudio.com/) - _Earth_** (Menu, Creative)
- **[Shauny Jang](https://www.shaunyjangaudio.com/) - _Sprouting_** (Menu)
### Fan-made
- **[Firch](https://firch.bandcamp.com/) - _Secret_** (Frozen/Jagged Peaks, Snowy Slopes, Grove)
- **[Firch](https://firch.bandcamp.com/) - _Garden_** (Swamp, Forest)
- **[Firch](https://firch.bandcamp.com/) - _Maw_** (The End)
- **[Firch](https://firch.bandcamp.com/) - _Prophet_** (Warped Forest)
- **[Firch](https://firch.bandcamp.com/) - _Burning Gecko_** (Badlands)
- **[Greenpixel](https://jamiemakes.art/) - _Depths_** (Deep Dark, Dripstone/Lush Caves)
